Chart 5 : Purpose of visit vs main source markets
The  majority  of  tourists  visiting  Sri  Lanka  from  the  top  source  markets  of  Russia,  India,
Germany,  the  United  Kingdom,  France,  and  Israel,  travelled  to  Sri  Lanka  for  pleasure  or
vacation. Specifically, 57% of tourists from Russia, 52.4% from India, 70% from Germany, 52%
from  the  United  Kingdom,  70%  from  France,  and  69%  from  Israel  visited  Sri  Lanka  for  this
purpose. It is noteworthy that for majority of tourists from Canada(73%) and Australia(67%) the VFR
main purpose of visit was seeing their friends and relatives. Only 20% of tourists from Canada VFR
